Class OshiMetrics

java.lang.Object
oshi.metrics.OshiMetrics
All Implemented Interfaces:
io.micrometer.core.instrument.binder.MeterBinder
public final class OshiMetrics extends Object implements io.micrometer.core.instrument.binder.MeterBinder
Entry point for OSHI system metrics. Registers metric binders with a MeterRegistry.

Metric names and attributes follow OpenTelemetry semantic conventions.

Usage (all metrics): 

OshiMetrics.bindTo(registry, SystemInfoFactory.create());

Usage (selective): 

OshiMetrics.builder(SystemInfoFactory.create()).enableCpu(true).enableMemory(true).enableDisk(false).build()
        .bindTo(registry);

Since this class accepts HardwareAbstractionLayer and OperatingSystem interfaces from oshi-common, it works identically with both the JNA (oshi-core) and FFM (oshi-core-ffm) implementations.
